ops.title: CDP-bridge integration surface (post-v0.12.0 auth refactor)
ops.body:
Design anchors for the live CDP bridge feature, reconciled against HEAD (commit 1f5e50a "v0.12.0 â€” one key path through internal/auth"). The prior plan assumed consent/grants lived in `internal/daemon/{handlers,consent,grants}.go`; that is stale.

**Where things live now:**
- Consent/release/grant core = new `internal/auth` package on `*Broker` (broker.go:58). Grant map `grants map[string]time.Time` keyed `requestor:browser`; `promptGate`, `batchFlight`, `Nonce func` fields. Built via `auth.NewBroker(consent, cache, probe, runner, state)` (broker.go:84) from daemon `build()`.
- Single release entry: `Broker.Key(ctx, Req)` (broker.go:112) â†’ `releaseAndCacheKey` â†’ `releaseKey` (release.go:50). `Req{Requestor,Browser,Profile,Reason,Mode}` (auth.go:81). Mode = ModeLocal/ModeApprover; Budget = OneFlight/PrimeAll; Surface = SurfaceNone/Local/Routed.
- `routesConsent` release.go:70; `routedRelease` consent.go:62; `requestConsent` consent.go:108; `peerIsLive` consent.go:156; `newNonce` consent.go:40. **`activePeer` does NOT exist** (inlined into routedRelease's candidate loop).
- Grants: `Granted` grants.go:26, `Grant` grants.go:41, `CapGrant` grants.go:53 (only shortens). TTL: AuthTTL=1h (state/settings.go:24), degradedAuthTTL=cache.DegradedTTL=5m (grants.go:22), effectiveTTL grants.go:68.
- Warm-grantâ†’silent-no-tap fast path: `warm && b.Granted(...)` in Broker.Key (broker.go:143), releaseAndCacheKey (release.go:21), oneFlight/primeAll. Bridge consent MUST bypass this (separate grant map + separate strict release).
- Consent iface `cookie.Consent` (cookie/consent.go:86); impl `TouchIDConsent` (consent.go:104). Passcode/no-gate fallbacks to bypass for strict-biometric: `bareOutcomes` (consent.go:275, exit-code-2, NO Touch ID) and `staleHelperOutcomes` (consent.go:185, .deviceOwnerAuthentication only).
- Daemon: `Daemon{broker,engine,probe,runner,state,registry}` (daemon.go:75). `Dispatcher()` daemon.go:150 â€” register bridge_open/status/close as plain `Register` (NOT Exclusive; must stay answerable during a mid-flight routed consent). Shutdown `defer closer` in `Serve` (daemon.go:175) â€” add bridge teardown there. `remoteGetCookies` (handlers.go:583) = ssh shell-out pattern with `--` fence + `hostregistry.ShellQuote` to copy for Phase B.
- cookie: `Extract` (pipeline.go:96, pure given key), `DecryptRow` (pipeline.go:52), `stores.Read` (stores.go:246), `ReadLocalStorage`/`ReadSessionStorage` (webstorage.go:185/220). `Cookie` (models.go:73) CHIPS fields TopFrameSiteKey + HasCrossSiteAncestor; no IsHostOnly field â€” derive from HostKey dot-prefix (`Applies` domains.go:38). SameSite int (0=None,1=Lax,2=Strict,-1=unspec); ExpiresUTC ChromeMicros â†’ chromeMicrosToUnix (models.go:47). `StorageState{Cookies,Origins}` (models.go:130). playwrightCookie forces secure when SameSite=None (mirror for CDP). `Browser` (browsers.go:31) has NO exe-path field. Registry() browsers.go:138 = chrome+arc only.
- cli: root.go:43 AddCommand block â†’ add newBridgeCmd(); rpc.go newRPCCmd:13 + rpcPassthrough:34 â†’ add bridge_open passthrough; resolveRequestor requestor.go:22.
- paths.Dir() paths.go:19, paths.SockPath() paths.go:25 â†’ bridge temp root under Dir()/bridge/.
- helper: `helper.Bridge` type (helper.go:88) â€” AVOID naming the new CDP package type `Bridge`; `.run(ctx,stdin,extraEnv,args...)` helper.go:177; reasonEnvVar COOKIESYNC_TOUCHID_REASON helper.go:32. Swift ops switch main.swift:484. `.deviceOwnerAuthentication` in evaluateVaultPolicy (main.swift:145, lines 147/157) â€” passcode-allowed. `.deviceOwnerAuthenticationWithBiometrics` only as a read-only probe in vaultStatus (main.swift:312). Strict-biometric CDP op = NEW evaluatePolicy(.deviceOwnerAuthenticationWithBiometrics) sibling + new swift `case` (e.g. cdp-unlock) + new cookie.Consent method that skips bareOutcomes/staleHelperOutcomes.
- **Process-group-kill pattern is NOT in engine/ssh.go** (that's a 1-line delegate to hostregistry.ExecSSH). Setpgid/Cancel/WaitDelay lives in synckit `hostregistry/dial.go:execSSHOnce` (v0.12.0). Copy THAT for the Chrome child and the `ssh -L` tunnel child.
- Greenfield: zero bridge/cdp/websocket/remote-debugging/pipe code in either repo. synckit v0.12.0 "tunnel lifecycle" = RPC-transport respawn, NOT an ssh -L port-forward â€” build ssh -L from scratch. No F1-F5 hardening exists (stale anchor; real recent auth commits: 1f5e50a, b649eaa, 064494d).

Plan file: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-01/plans/cookiesync-should-also-expose-glittery-avalanche.md
